section.title: Terms Defined Elsewhere
section.para: This document uses the following terms defined elsewhere:

listitem.para: "A <unit> MAY contain both source and target content, allowing bilingual data to be stored."
The <segment> element, used to represent the smallest unit of translatable content addressed for translation, review, or other processing.
Information about the nature and origin of the localization data or process.

section.title: Terms Defined in this Document
section.para: This document defines the following terms:

listitem.para: A collection of previously translated source and target content, organized for retrieval and reuse when equal or similar source content is encountered again.
A single stored source/target pair available for reuse, represented in this document as an XLIFF <unit> (or, where segmented, <segment>).

A ZIP archive containing one or more bilingual XLIFF files together with a manifest, used to exchange translation memory data across more than two languages, as described in Exchange of Multilingual Translation Memory Data.

section.title: Abbreviations and Acronyms
section.para: This document uses the following abbreviations and acronyms:

listitem.para: ZIP: A common archive file format
